common.tagline: Your voice. Your city. Your fix.

auth.termsAgree: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

hero.title: Transform Complaints into Action
hero.subtitle: Report local issues, rally community support, and track resolutions in real-time.

howItWorks.title: How CivicFix Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to make your voice heard
howItWorks.step1Desc: Snap a photo and describe the issue in your neighborhood
howItWorks.step2Desc: Community upvotes highlight the most urgent issues
howItWorks.step3Desc: City officials track progress and update status in real-time

issues.title: Reported Issues
issues.subtitle: Track community progress and join the conversation in real-time.
issues.setResidenceAlert: Please set your residence in your profile first to filter by local reports.
issues.noIssuesDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search query
issues.noDescription: No description provided by the reporter.
issues.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to share an update!

report.title: Report an Issue
report.successDesc: Thank you for contributing to your community.
report.signInRequired: You must be signed in to report an issue.
report.noIssueReturned: Report submitted but no issue returned.
report.selectCategoryDesc: What type of issue are you reporting? Select the most relevant category.
report.pinLocationDesc: Drag the map to pin the exact location of the issue.
report.addressPlaceholder: e.g., Bole Road, near Friendship Hotel
report.addDetailsDesc: Provide more context to help us resolve this faster.
report.similarIssuesDesc: Consider upvoting an existing report or use a different location.
report.reviewDesc: Double check the details before submitting to the city.

comments.title: Discussion
comments.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to share your thoughts.

login.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.linkSentSingular: We've sent a password reset link to your email address.
forgotPassword.linkSent: We've sent a password reset link to your email address.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Check your spam folder if you don't see it within a few minutes.

resetPassword.title: Create New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Please enter your new password below.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully updated. Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.errorLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information
profile.aboutPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Keep track of your community impact
notifications.loginDescription: Please sign in to view your notifications.
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: We'll notify you when someone upvotes your reports or when there's an update on issues you follow.

templates.status_change_follower: The issue "{issue}" you are following is now {status}.

dashboard.title: My Reports
dashboard.subtitle: Track the impact you've made in your community.

empty.title: No reports from you yet
empty.desc: You haven't reported any issues. Start by helping your community or check what's happening nearby.

instructions.title: How to select location:
instructions.gps: Click the {icon} button to use your current GPS location
instructions.click: Or click anywhere on the map to place a marker
instructions.drag: Drag the marker to adjust the exact spot

errors.noGeolocation: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
errors.locateFailed: Could not get your location. Using default location (Addis Ababa).
